ch11_start.text: The main power grid fails. The station goes completely dark, leaving only the bioluminescent glow of the spores. To restore auxiliary power, you must swim through the completely flooded Lower Maintenance sector.

choices.text: Equip your rebreather and dive in.
Hold your breath and dive in.

ch11_dive_safe.text: The rebreather provides steady air as you navigate the dark, freezing water. You swim past floating debris and assimilated crew members, arriving at the auxiliary power terminal.

ch11_dive_unsafe.text: You hold your breath and plunge in. The freezing water burns your lungs. You accidentally swallow a mouthful of the spore-infested water. You reach the auxiliary power terminal, gasping for air.

ch11_miller_encounter.text: As you reach for the breaker, a massive shape shifts in the water. It's Miller. But he is fully assimilated, a hulking monstrosity of flesh and tendrils, his face fused with the metal of his hazard suit. He lunges at you.

choices.text: Fight him off with a floating pipe.
Project the memory of his daughter into the hive mind.

ch11_fight_miller.text: You swing the heavy pipe, crushing the fused helmet of the husk. It screams with Miller's voice and thrashes violently before sinking into the abyss. You flip the breaker. Auxiliary power is restored.

ch11_spare_miller.text: You focus your infected mind on the memory of the medical bills, of Miller's desperate love for his daughter. The husk freezes. The tendrils loosen. It looks at you with human sadness, then sinks peacefully into the dark.

choices.text: Flip the breaker and swim back up.

ch11_end.text: You break the surface, gasping for air. The red emergency lights flicker back on. You survived Lower Maintenance, but the station is still dying.
